title: Non-Host Browser Compare Decision Surface
objective: Decide whether any later browser comparison should run from a non-host or optional-client surface while preserving the Olares host as the durable development anchor and keeping host browser-runtime expansion closed by default.
required_inputs: Current rule that host browser-runtime expansion remains closed
The browser static-surface smoke target in `apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.static-surfaces.smoke.spec.ts`
decision_scope: Decide whether any later browser comparison should be routed to a workstation or optional-client surface.
Preserve the Olares host as the durable development anchor.
Keep host browser-runtime expansion closed unless a separate later authority packet changes that rule.
decision_rationale: The public Operations host can be reached from the current non-host browser surface without reopening host browser-runtime tooling.

Live checks against `https://operations.apexpowerops.com/pm-review/index.html` and `/pm-review/schedule.html` showed the expected page titles and headings rendered in a real browser while preserving the Olares host as the durable development anchor.

Those same pages still attempt to reach `http://localhost:8000/...` for live schedule data and fail with `ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED`, so the truthful bounded slice is a render-level static-surface compare only, not a live-data browser proof.
This keeps host browser-runtime expansion closed while still allowing a narrow optional-client or workstation browser validation lane.

decision_evidence.live_data_boundary: routes still call localhost schedule APIs and fail with ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED

next_packet_candidate: Olares Dev Residency 021 - Bounded Non-Host Public-Host Static Surface Browser Compare Execution
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-05 as a decision-only packet. Packet 020 opens a bounded non-host browser compare lane limited to public-host static-surface render checks and explicitly keeps live-data browser proof closed because the current routes still depend on localhost schedule APIs.
next_action: Execute Packet 021 as a bounded non-host public-host static-surface browser compare slice.
